positive: A minimalist and vibrant abstract representation of a nebula forming over a stylized mountain landscape. The main subject is a blend of deep indigo, cosmic teal, and glowing gold accents. The composition should be centered, featuring strong, clean silhouettes of stylized peaks contrasted against the fluid, glowing nebula. Use sharp edges and soft gradients for contrast. Graphic style, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing. Highly saturated, high contrast, symmetrical balance. Digital painting, pop art influence, perfect for t-shirt print.
negative: blurry, out of focus, noise, grain, artifacts, text, words, logos, signatures, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, creepy, deformed, jpeg artifacts, messy, cluttered, low contrast, grayscale, hyperrealistic, photo, sketch
